title: erigeron elatus
intro: Erigeron elatus, also known as tall fleabane or tall daisy, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Erigeron elatus include reducing inflammation and pain, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antihistamine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
